overview: Digital Zindagi is a premium multi-vendor marketplace PWA for India — emerald green branded, mobile-first, fully installable. Supports providers, customers, admins, managers, and delivery boys with real-time sync, GPS-based discovery, and comprehensive admin control.
features: Udhaar Khata on Homepage next to Rate Calculator
AdMob Banner ads on Udhaar and Rate Calculator pages
Interstitial ads after transaction save and WhatsApp share
Admin toggle for Udhaar Khata feature with Unit ID fields
Provider data isolation via secure principal-based storage
Real-time admin sync for all settings
Multi-role access: Provider, Customer, Admin, Manager
Video Gallery with platform and category filters
News, Jobs, Student Tools, Custom Code Manager
